title: TSBIE-TS Inter Results 2026 Live Updates: 1st, 2nd Year Result, Marks Memo Out Today, Download Link Here
description: TS Inter Results 2026 Live Updates (1st & 2nd Year): The Telangana board will release the Class 11 and 12 result for over 9 lakh students today, April 11, 2026. Check Official Websites, Direct link to download results here.
